title: 180mm Sanding Discs 80 Grit, 40Pcs Hook and Loop Sander Disc, 7Inch 8 Holes Sandpaper Sheet for Drywall Sander Long Neck Sander
features: Package Included: 40Pcs sanding discs 80 grit, the commonly used grits is sufficient for your daily use needs.
Material: High quality alumina sanding discs pads with special heat treatment, its excellent polishing, sharp and wear resistant, good choice for sanding and polishing.
Hook and Loop Design: Hook and loop backing design, easy to install and remove，use with 180mm hook and loop backing pads. 8 hole design can reduce dust and long lasting.
Application: Mainly used in sanding large surfaces of all kinds of materials,such as wood, plastic, metal or painted surfaces polishing paint stripping, deburring and so on.
Suitable for: 180mm large sanding discs with velcro back, applicable to long handle sander, drywall sanders, wall sanders, sanding giraffe.
description: Product Description Hook and Loop Backing Hook and loop backing design makes the sand removal and replacement fast and simple High Strength Resin Bonding System High quality alumina sanding discs pads with special heat treatment, its excellent polishing, sharp and wear resistant, good choice for sanding and polishing.
